# Vendored Dear ImGui

- Upstream: https://github.com/ocornut/imgui
- Version: **v1.92.8** (tag `v1.92.8`, commit `8936b58fe26e8c3da834b8f60b06511d537b4c63`)
- License: MIT (see `LICENSE.txt` in this directory) -- unrelated to sumu's AGPL-3.0, do not
  add sumu SPDX headers to any file in this directory.
- Files taken: core (`imgui.cpp imgui_draw.cpp imgui_tables.cpp imgui_widgets.cpp
  imgui_demo.cpp`) + headers (`imgui.h imconfig.h imgui_internal.h imstb_rectpack.h
  imstb_textedit.h imstb_truetype.h`) + backends
  (`backends/imgui_impl_dx11.{cpp,h}`, `backends/imgui_impl_win32.{cpp,h}`).
- Unmodified from upstream -- no local patches.
